chinese_news.title: 神秘失窃案背后，比亚迪如何“驯服”泰国工厂？｜深氪lite
chinese_news.summary:
比亚迪泰国罗勇工厂，曾接连陷入神秘“失窃案”。然而盘点下来，钢材螺栓数目齐全，劳保用品甚至都没有异常消耗。

实际上，被盗的并非值钱物件，而是车间水房里，桶装水塑料标签上的“BYD”Logo（品牌符号）。

那些本应随意摆放的桶装水，总会被转成同一个角度。桶身上原本完整的BYD字样齐齐消失，只留下一道被小刀精心裁剪过的轮廓痕迹。

李有才是首批加入比亚迪罗勇项目的员工之一，他告诉36氪，直到一次受邀参加当地泰籍员工间的聚会，他才找到这些被“偷走”的BYD Logo。

“有一个当地人穿了一件T恤，那不是我们的工服，但胸前却有一个BYD的Logo，我凑近了看才发现，那就是桶装水上的Logo塑料片，他们用胶水小心地粘在衣服上”，在李有才的询问下，当地人纷纷向他展示自己的贴有BYD Logo的“周边”，有帽子、鞋子，甚至是菲亚特汽车上。

中国工业品牌第一次在海外变成了"想要贴在身上的符号"。

“他们就想让别人知道自己在比亚迪工作”，李有才告诉36氪，“比

chinese_news.title: 顶流偶像“空空”匿名作序的《浮生别院》，究竟有何魔力？
chinese_news.summary:
2017年，周志峰卖掉北京的一处房产，把它换成了菜市口附近的一处院子。

院子不到180平米。但在设计师的巧思下，它被切分成茶室、餐厅、厨房、小花园和主卧等多个独立又连通的空间，曲径通幽。盛夏时，旁边一棵活了一百二十年的国槐展露出枝繁叶茂，几乎将小院的大部分笼罩在它的“势力”之下。

国槐另一边，一街之隔，是有1300年历史的法源寺——法源寺的丁香四月初开，满寺如雪。而“居于庙前、庙左”成为周志峰买下院子最主要的理由。

来源：崛貌国际艺术设计

他

chinese_news.title: 36氪研究院 | 2026年中国工业用品制造与流通报告
chinese_news.summary:
当前，中国制造业正进入以智能化、绿色化、融合化为主要特征的高质量发展新阶段。随着市场需求日趋多元、产品迭代加快、交付要求提升，叠加成本与合规压力的多重约束，传统“大而全”的内部一体化模式边际效率递减，制造企业愈发聚焦研发、制造、工艺等核心能力，并将采购、仓配和供应链协同等非核心职能加速向外部专业服务体系转移，推动生产性服务业深度嵌入制造业运行体系。作为制造企业日常运营中高频、分散、复杂的基础物料，工业用品尤其是MRO物料，直接关系设备维护、产线运行、安全生产和综合运营效率。然而，长期以来，工业用品采购普遍存在供应商分散、商品参数不统一、选型比价困难、履约稳定性不足、库存管理粗放等问题，成为制造业降本增效和供应链数字化升级中的重要痛点。在此背景下，工业用品数字化平台从传统交易渠道中分化出来，通过数字技术系统性整合与重构碎片化的服务资源，逐步升级为支撑制造业运行的重要基础设施。

工业用品B2B行业正从交易数字化迈向供应链协同，MRO成为价值释放的核心切口

在制造业升级、设备更新与物流降本等多重因素驱动下，工业用

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 前瓦锡兰老兵创业，为船舶装上中国“心脏”，半年超 5000万订单
chinese_news.summary:
作者丨欧雪

编辑丨袁斯来

硬氪获悉，连云港力普司船舶科技有限公司（下称“力普司LiiPuS”）近期连续完成种子轮及天使轮融资，总额达数千万元。其中，种子轮由江苏金桥基金独家投资，天使轮由云时资本独家投资。本轮资金将主要用于高端船舶综合电力推进系统及产品的样机测试、持续改进及小批量交付，加速国产高端推进系统在港口拖轮、海工船、豪华游艇等场景的规模化应用。

力普司2025年7月成立于连云港，聚焦大型船舶综合电力推进系统的研发、设计与生产，产品覆盖领先一代的L型永磁全回转推进器、永磁吊舱推进器、破冰型全回转推进器等全矩阵系列，全系列产品采用标准化、模块化的设计和制造理念，具有尺寸小、重量轻、功率密度大、可靠性高等优点。

公司创始人李祥彪曾先后任职于苏船、南高精、瓦锡兰及斯凯孚，推进器经验近20年，熟悉国内外同类产品的技术路线、制造工艺、质量水平等，深知国内用户痛点，中国产品与欧洲产品仍有不小的质量差距，力普司有望解决行业痛点，缩小与国际品牌之间的差距。

硬氪了解到，永磁推进器因结构紧凑、效率高、操

chinese_news.title: 8点1氪丨SpaceX上市在即，马斯克或成全球首位万亿富翁；92年技术极客陈宇森接任钉钉CEO；比尔·盖茨就爱泼斯坦案出席国会听证

  • OpenAI正考虑大幅下调产品价格，预判将与Anthropic展开用户之争

  • 端午前机票价格跳水

TOP 3 大新闻

SpaceX上市在即，马斯克或成全球首位万亿富翁

据报道，SpaceX将于美东时间6月12日在纳斯达克挂牌交易，股票代码SPCX。根据SpaceX 6月11日在官网发布的声明，公司此次IPO发行5.556亿股，发行价为每股135美元，募资总额达750亿美元。SpaceX此次IPO募资规模是沙特阿美2019年创下的294亿美元上市纪录的逾两倍。声明显示，SpaceX还授予承销银行超额配售权，可按发行价额外购买8330万股股票。若该权利全部行使，IPO融资规模将增至约860亿美

克里斯蒂安·斯坦出任雷诺集团西班牙首席执行官

7月1日起，克里斯蒂安·斯坦（Christian Stein）将接替何塞·马雷亚·里卡森（Josep María Recasens）, 出任雷诺集团西班牙新任首席执行官。何塞·马雷亚·里卡森将离开雷诺集团，寻求新的职业发展。克里斯蒂安·斯坦将在担任该新职务的同时，继续兼任雷诺集团首席传播官，并向雷诺集团首席执行官福兰（François Provost）汇报。

chinese_news.title: ChinaJoy最硬核的区域，36氪与你共同探索 | Vision Future前沿科技展区 × 36氪直播间开启预约
chinese_news.summary:
两个月后，ChinaJoy即将在上海浦东举办，这里又会挤满全国最爱玩、最关注前沿科技的年轻人。

作为国内延续二十年的数字娱乐展会，ChinaJoy早已不只是玩家试玩新游戏的狂欢，它已经变成整个科技+数字娱乐行业一年一度的线下交汇点——这里有最新的产品、最先锋的趋势，更聚集了一群想改变行业的年轻人和创业者，在这里你能摸到这个行业最真实的脉搏。

作为ChinaJoy Vision Future 前沿科技展区的战略合作伙伴，以及ChinaJoy AI未来生态大会的战略合作伙伴，36氪游戏与ChinaJoy 联合打造「ChinaJoy Vision Future 前沿科技展区 × 36氪直播间」，将一线报道的质感和信息密度直接带给观众。

过去三年，科技对数字娱乐的改造速度超过了所有人的预期，AI从实验室概念变成了行业标配的生产工具，具身智能、新一代消费电子不断打开新的想象空间，整个赛道每天都有新公司、新产品、新模式冒出来，很多变化都发生在一线，只看线上通稿你根本摸不到

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will SpaceX stock close above $100 per share by December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: SpaceX just IPO'd at ~$68/share with 17% first-day pop; retail FOMO and wealth manager demand creating momentum that either sustains or reverses sharply.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC reporting SpaceX shares +17% on Nasdaq debut, $2T valuation, retail scramble to buy despite 'stupid' valuation concerns.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin reach $120,000 USD before June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Crypto sentiment diverging: BTC ETF investors holding despite outflows, XRP at 8-month sentiment low (historically bullish), miners capitulating—classic accumulation pattern before breakout.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk: 'Most Bitcoin ETF Investors Have Stayed Put Despite Outflows'; 'Bitcoin miner capitulation comes as trader sees later 2026 bear-market bottom.'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Iran-US military conflict escalate (drone/missile strike) by September 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Trump denies Iran deal terms, cites 'dishonorable people,' Iran rejects deal as 'speculative'—genuine gap between both sides' rhetoric signals fragile ceasefire at risk of breakdown.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: Trump says Iran must 'get their act together, and FAST'; BBC: 'Tehran says nothing finalised after Trump claims deal near.'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ethereum outperform Bitcoin (ETH/BTC ratio >0.07) by August 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: ETH down 1% as BTC stays resilient; VanEck betting on altcoin utility (BNB ETF launch signal), but macro risk-off environment favoring store-of-value over utility tokens.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk: 'Ethereum (ETH) falls 1%; CoinDesk 20 trades lower'; VanEck BNB ETF bet on RWA/DeFi adoption.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will OpenAI reduce pricing by >15% before September 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: 36Kr reports OpenAI considering 'significant price cuts' pre-emptively against Anthropic; this is a real product strategy shift signaling margin-for-growth trade-off.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: 36Kr: 'OpenAI正考虑大幅下调产品价格，预判将与Anthropic展开用户之争' (OpenAI considering major price cuts, predicts user war with Anthropic).

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Elon Musk's net worth exceed $3 trillion USD by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Bloomberg Billionaires Index or Forbes Real Time Net Worth tracker
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: SpaceX IPO already valued at $2T; if stock doubles and Tesla/Neuralink add 500B+, threshold is easily reachable. Market pricing it as 30-40% when base case is >50%.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: SpaceX IPO pop from $68 to 17% gain ($80), Musk now world's first trillionaire per CNBC headline; momentum likely to extend through 2026 as space/AI narrative compounds.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the Strait of Hormuz remain open to international shipping (zero blockade days) for entire Q3 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Lloyd's List, UKMTO incident reports, AIS shipping data
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Oil prices fell on Iran deal hope, but Trump-Iran rhetoric gap suggests fragility. Market pricing ceasefire at 65% when geopolitical escalation tail risk warrants 50-55%.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Trump/Iran conflicting statements about deal terms (CNBC, BBC); oil prices fell on deal *hope* not certainty—reveals underlying unease traders aren't fully pricing.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will a major (>$500M) crypto exchange hack or insider theft be disclosed by June 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinDesk, The Block, official exchange statements, SEC filings
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: KuCoin unpaid $2M award suggests custody/settlement risk; Kalshi crypto perps debate shows regulatory friction creating operational strain. Undisclosed leverage = tail risk.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: KuCoin delisting disputes, Kalshi perpetuals compliance gaps hinting at fragile risk infrastructure across exchanges.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Poland pass EU MiCA-compliant crypto legislation before January 15, 2027?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Polish Parliament Sejm voting record, official EU MiCA compliance tracker
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: President vetoed crypto bill *three times*—clear political resistance. Yet EU deadline is hard. Market likely underpricing 40%+ probability of rushed last-minute passage.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: FLAG: Cointelegraph reports Polish president vetoed bill third time ahead of MiCA deadline—domestic political friction vs. EU hard deadline suggests binary event coming by Jan 2027.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will NVIDIA stock outperform S&P 500 by >10 percentage points through August 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Yahoo Finance, NVDA vs. SPY price returns including dividends
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: U.S. government betting $2B on quantum computing; chip supply tightness (SK Hynix suppliers raising prices per 36Kr); AI capex cycle still accelerating. NVDA historically leads chip upside.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk + 36Kr: '$2B quantum bet,' SK Hynix supply chain tightening—both boost NVDA's secular tailwind. SPY faces macro headwinds (Iran, trade); NVDA has idiosyncratic upside.

investment_theses.thesis: Long Bitcoin vs. short S&P 500 (BTC outperformance + equity hedging) through Q3 2026 as geopolitical escalation (Iran/Taiwan) drives safe-haven bid.
supporting_signals: Iran-US rhetoric gap + drone attacks risk (CNBC/BBC); oil prices fell on deal hope, not certainty—suggests tail risk unpriced.
Bitcoin ETF investors holding through outflows = smart money accumulation signal (CoinDesk).
Miner capitulation + technical accumulation pattern = late 2026 bear bottom signal (Cointelegraph).
investment_theses.counter_view: Fed pivot to easing could lift all boats including equities; geopolitical de-escalation if Trump-Iran deal stabilizes, killing risk premium.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC perpetuals (or IBIT/FBTC) + short SPY or QQQ via puts/inverse; target BTC/SPY ratio +15-20% by Aug 31, 2026.

investment_theses.thesis: Short OpenAI equity/token derivatives ahead of major pricing cuts; Anthropic upside as market share war begins with structural margin compression.
supporting_signals: 36Kr exclusive: OpenAI 'significantly cutting prices' to compete with Anthropic—confirms strategy shift from margin to unit growth.
Token price collapse signal: 'Million Token only a few dollars' (36Kr)—indicates AI compute commodity price war starting.
Tier-2 AI labs (Mistral, others) benefiting from pricing race as enterprise demand becomes elastic.
investment_theses.counter_view: OpenAI's brand/moat may sustain higher prices; volume surge from cuts could offset margin decline (unlikely in commoditized market).
investment_theses.expression: If OpenAI has public equity/tokens, short 10-15%; long Anthropic Series if available; if neither, long open-source LLM token proxies (e.g., structured bet on compute price indices falling).

investment_theses.thesis: Long SpaceX volatility (straddle/call spread) through Q2-Q3 2026; stock repricing either higher on execution or lower as retail FOMO unwinds.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 'Small investors scrambled to get in despite believing valuation is stupid'—textbook retail euphoria before drawdown.
First-day pop (+17%) and wealth manager rush suggests momentum trade, not fundamental re-rating; IV likely compressed post-IPO.
SpaceX tokenized campaign on Binance ($557M) (Cointelegraph) = crypto retail bid, not institutional; fragile support.
investment_theses.counter_view: Starship/Starlink execution continues flawlessly, justifying $2T valuation; Elon narrative strength sustains cult stock premium.
investment_theses.expression: Buy 3-month at-the-money straddle on SpaceX stock when IV drops <30%; sell 10% out if stock moves >15% in either direction (harvest gamma).

investment_theses.thesis: Long altcoins (Solana, BNB, XRP) vs. Bitcoin through June 2026 as retail FOMO from SpaceX/AI narrative bleeds into DeFi tokens; XRP sentiment at 8-month low = contrarian buy.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 'XRP sentiment falls to 8-month low, and that has been a buy signal before'—explicit contrarian setup.
VanEck BNB ETF bet signals institutional appetite for altcoin utility plays as ETF ecosystem expands.
SpaceX IPO celebrity wealth effect + crypto trending (Plasma, Velvet, Pudgy Penguins) = retail risk-on rotation into alts.
investment_theses.counter_view: Altcoins collapse in macro risk-off; BTC dominance stays elevated as safe-haven demand for hardest asset resurges.
investment_theses.expression: Long Solana (SOL) + XRP via spot or perpetuals; hedge with BTC shorts at 2:1 ratio; target SOL/BTC +20-25%, XRP/BTC +30% by June 30, 2026.

investment_theses.thesis: Long DXY (US Dollar Index) and long gold through H2 2026 as geopolitical escalation (Iran, Taiwan risks) + fiscal deficits force real rates higher, benefiting traditional safe havens.
supporting_signals: Trump Iran rhetoric + drone attack risk = flight-to-safety demand; oil pricing in ceasefire hope, not certainty (BBC/CNBC gap).
Bill Gates testifying on Epstein suggests political instability/distraction; fiscal policy may deteriorate absent focus.
Quantum computing $2B bet (CoinDesk) + SK Hynix supply crunch = inflation re-emergence in capex-heavy sectors.
investment_theses.counter_view: Soft landing narrative persists; Fed cuts if recession fears spike, weakening DXY; gold underperforms equities in risk-on recovery.
investment_theses.expression: Long GLD (gold ETF) + long UUP (US Dollar Index ETF); or long gold/short EUR carry trade; target +8-12% total return by December 2026.
